notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; local rules are used only as fallback.

articles.title: Antenna System for Simultaneous Wireless Power and Information Transfer to Brain Implants
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 解决的问题：这篇论文试图把 brain_computer_interface 方向的研究推进到更可用的场景。
paperCard.method: 解决方式：基于完整可读内容，概括它用什么模型、材料或系统流程解决问题。
paperCard.difference: 不同之处：重点看它是否比旧方法更稳定、更便宜、更准确或更容易部署。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点：把技术改进和真实应用目标连接起来，而不是只停留在理论指标。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现：先看输入数据，再看核心模型或装置，最后看实验验证结果。
paperCard.applications: 应用途径：优先关注医疗辅助、工业系统、智能硬件、能源设备等可落地方向。
technicalTerms: EEG：把大脑电信号当作输入数据。
paperCard.whySelected: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

articles.summary: 本地规则只确认这篇论文有公开全文入口；智能总结需要 DeepSeek key 和完整内容输入后生成。
articles.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway fallback: check experiment conditions, sample size, cost, regulatory path, and reproducibility.
